summary: A full-stack logistics platform for a Manhattan-to-Hamptons delivery service, featuring a multi-step booking wizard, dynamic pricing engine, dual user models, and real-time delivery tracking via Onfleet API.
description: ToteTaxi is a production-grade logistics platform built for a company that transports clients from Manhattan to their second homes in the Hamptons. The platform handles complex booking workflows, role-based dashboards for clients and staff, payment processing, and seamless third-party API orchestration.
features: Multi-step booking wizard with address validation and scheduling
Dynamic pricing engine based on distance, service type, and items
Dual user models for clients and staff with role-based dashboards
Real-time delivery integration via Onfleet API
Stripe payment processing with secure checkout
problems_solved: Automated complex booking and pricing calculations
Unified client and staff workflows in one platform
Real-time delivery tracking and status updates
Secure payment processing with proper error handling
Streamlined operations for seasonal delivery business
technical_highlights: React 19 with TypeScript for type-safe frontend development
Django REST Framework API design with proper serialization
Onfleet webhook integration for real-time delivery updates
Stripe Checkout integration with webhook handling
